The stranger’s honeyed brown, dilated eyes resembled that of a cow, drugged up and about to be slaughtered. Still staring back

This was going to be easier than he thought.

Soap leaned back in his seat, splaying his legs open, one hand going up to smooth his mohawk, the other resting at his crotch.

data.body:
Ghost's fingers slipped into his mouth, Soap tasted his sweaty and sour, pungent precum- he bit down. He couldn't wait, he wanted to *taste* Ghost now.

Ghost didn't remove his hand.

Soap immediately opened his eyes and choked. Pulling his head forward, his hands rushing up to wipe and pull away-
